description: Springfield in the streaming age. The collection runs through Season 37.

episodes.title: The Serfsons
episodes.description: In a magical medieval world, Marge's mother is turned into an Ice Walker and the only way for Homer to afford the cure is to force Lisa to use illegal magic. When the King discovers this, he kidnaps Lisa, and Homer must lead a feudal uprising to save her.
episodes.notes: This marks the first time The Simpsons devoted an entire regular episode to parodying Game of Thrones, capitalizing on the HBO series' peak cultural dominance in 2017.

episodes.title: Springfield Splendor
episodes.description: Marge and Lisa turn Lisa’s sad experience into a successful graphic novel-turned-Broadway show, but they struggle with creative differences and ego.
episodes.parody_of: Broadway musicals and graphic novel culture

episodes.title: Whistler's Father
episodes.description: Homer discovers that Maggie is a whistling savant and launches her baby-celebrity career. Meanwhile, Marge impresses Fat Tony with her interior design taste, and he hires her to style his brothel.

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
episodes.description: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy/perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.
episodes.couch_gag: The family sits on the couch which turns into a monster and eats them.
episodes.parody_of: Horror films including The Exorcist, Invasion of the Body Snatchers, and cannibal horror
episodes.notes: The twenty-eighth Treehouse of Horror made The Simpsons the longest-running primetime scripted series to produce annual Halloween specials, surpassing all other animated shows in television history.

episodes.title: Grampy Can Ya Hear Me
episodes.description: Grampa gets a hearing aid and finally hears what everyone has been saying about him. Meanwhile, Mr. Skinner discovers that his mother has kept the ultimate secret from him.

episodes.title: The Old Blue Mayor She Ain't What She Used to Be
episodes.description: Frustrated with the local government, Marge decides to run for Mayor. To win public support, she begins making Homer the butt of her jokes.

episodes.title: Singin' in the Lane
episodes.description: Homer and the guys try helping Moe cheer up by getting their old bowling team back together again, but they soon face a team of arrogant millionaires.

episodes.title: Mr. Lisa's Opus
episodes.description: As future Lisa writes her college application essay for Harvard, she recalls past disappointing birthdays that helped shape her.

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.title: Gone Boy
episodes.description: When Bart goes missing, the town puts together a search party to find him. After most give up hope, Sideshow Bob manipulates Millhouse into revealing where Bart is hiding.

episodes.title: Haw-Haw Land
episodes.description: When the Simpsons go to a STEM conference, Lisa falls for a crooning jazz pianist named Brendan. Meanwhile, Bart discovers that he has an affinity for chemistry
episodes.notes: This episode marked one of the few times The Simpsons directly parodied a recent Best Picture Oscar winner, with "La La Land" having won just months before the episode aired in January 2018.

episodes.title: Frink Gets Testy
episodes.description: Mr. Burns will build a doomsday ark after he believes that the end of the world is near when he sees an old Orson Welles show about Nostradamus. Meanwhile, Professor Frink comes up with a new way of testing everyone in Springfield after Burns wants a test to determine who should go on a spaceship with him.
episodes.parody_of: Orson Welles broadcasts and doomsday/apocalypse films

episodes.title: Homer Is Where the Art Isn't
episodes.description: When Homer is accused of stealing a million-dollar painting, only a detective from the 1970s can clear his name.

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.title: 3 Scenes Plus a Tag from a Marriage
episodes.description: Homer and Marge recount the story of their transition from loving their life without kids to being miserable parents.
episodes.notes: This anthology-style episode marked a rare format departure for The Simpsons, telling three distinct vignettes about Homer and Marge's parenting journey rather than following a traditional single storyline structure.

episodes.title: Fears of a Clown
episodes.description: Everybody is now horrified of clowns after Bart's prank using clown masks, which also causes  Krusty to lose his job. He attempts a comeback as a dramatic actor in the play "The Salesman's Bad Day", with Llewellyn Sinclair as his director.
episodes.notes: The episode aired on April Fool's Day 2018, making it one of the few Simpsons episodes to directly align with its theme of pranks and fear. This marks another collaboration with acclaimed theater director Llewellyn Sinclair, who previously appeared directing Springfield's productions in earlier seasons.

episodes.title: No Good Read Goes Unpunished
episodes.description: In an attempt to bring the family together, Marge forces everyone to hand in their electronics and take a trip to a book store.

episodes.title: King Leer
episodes.description: Homer and Marge follow Moe after the bar closes early and discover him and his father fighting. The Simpsons, after finding out that Moe has been excommunicated from his family for years, attempt to bring them back together.

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.notes: This episode marks one of the rare times Moe's family background is explored in depth, introducing his father and siblings after nearly three decades of the character's existence.

episodes.title: Lisa Gets the Blues
episodes.description: When the Simpsons' flight to Gainesville gets re-routed to New Orleans, Lisa is forced to face her failures, and regain her confidence as a jazz musician. Meanwhile, Bart is intrigued by the voodoo in Louisiana, and Homer is intrigued by the drinking.

episodes.title: Forgive and Regret
episodes.description: Grampa makes a confession to Homer while on his deathbed. After his recovery, he comes to realize that this issue will not be easy to reconcile.

episodes.title: Left Behind
episodes.description: Homer gets Flanders a job at the plant, and he soon learns that no good deed goes unpunished when Flanders starts to insist on carpools and demands more from Homer's work performance. Meanwhile, Marge feels as though their marriage has lost its spark.

episodes.title: Throw Grampa from the Dane
episodes.description: The Simpsons go to Denmark so Grampa can benefit from its free health-care system.
episodes.notes: This episode marks one of the few times The Simpsons directly addressed contemporary American healthcare debates by contrasting the U.S. system with Denmark's universal healthcare model.

episodes.title: Flanders' Ladder
episodes.description: Bart falls into a coma after being struck by lightning.
episodes.notes: This psychological horror parody of Adrian Lyne's 1990 film "Jacob's Ladder" marked one of the show's rare attempts at sustained dark, surreal storytelling outside of the annual Treehouse of Horror format.

episodes.title: Bart's Not Dead
episodes.description: Bart takes a dare, and ends up in the hospital. To cover for himself and Homer, he says he went to Heaven and met Jesus. Christian producers offer the Simpsons a movie deal, which Homer takes. But Bart can't deal with the guilt and comes clean to Marge after the movie is finished.
episodes.parody_of: Christian movies and the faith-based film industry
episodes.notes: This season 30 premiere marked The Simpsons' entry into its fourth decade on television, making it the longest-running American sitcom, animated series, and primetime scripted series in history.

episodes.title: Heartbreak Hotel
episodes.description: Marge and Homer's marriage is tested when they travel to a tropical island to compete for a million dollars on Marge's favorite reality competition show.
episodes.notes: This episode marked one of the few times in the series' 30+ season run that Homer and Marge's marriage was genuinely tested through external competition rather than Homer's typical domestic blunders.

episodes.title: My Way or the Highway to Heaven
episodes.description: God and St. Peter contemplate what merits a soul getting into heaven, while citizens of Springfield remember their divine encounters.

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXIX
episodes.description: Homer wins an oyster-eating contest against the mythical Cthulhu, Springfield is overrun by plant body-snatchers, Lisa finally snaps and Mr. Burns opens a retirement home with some Jurassic upgrades.
episodes.parody_of: Invasion of the Body Snatchers and Jurassic Park

episodes.title: Baby You Can't Drive My Car
episodes.description: A self-driving car company comes to Springfield, poaching all of the power plant employees with their fun work environment.

episodes.title: From Russia Without Love
episodes.description: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse get Moe a mail-order bride on the Dark Web.

episodes.title: Werking Mom
episodes.description: Marge wants a job, and stumbles into becoming a plastic food storage container-selling drag queen. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make the world better in the style of "Amelie"

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.title: Krusty the Clown
episodes.description: Homer finds his calling as a TV recapper, but his harsh grading causes a brawl with Krusty. After almost killing Homer, Krusty hides out at a real circus, and finds happiness there.

episodes.title: Daddicus Finch
episodes.description: Lisa and Homer's bond gets stronger when they start spending real quality time together, and Bart feels neglected. So Marge tries to help Homer balance his attention between the kids.

episodes.title: 'Tis the 30th Season
episodes.description: After a failed Black Friday shopping spree, Marge is determined to fix Christmas; Homer and the kids surprise Marge with a vacation to a Florida resort.
episodes.notes: This milestone 30th season Christmas episode marked The Simpsons as the longest-running American sitcom, animated series, and primetime scripted series in television history.

episodes.title: Mad About the Toy
episodes.description: When Marge and Homer leave Grampa to baby-sit the kids, some little green army men trigger a PTSD episode, sending the family on a journey to Grampa's past and the time period when he was a post-war toy model.

episodes.title: The Girl on the Bus
episodes.description: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family.

episodes.title: I'm Dancing as Fat as I Can
episodes.description: Homer angers Marge by binging their favorite show without her, and has to pick up a new skill in order to make amends. Meanwhile, Bart prepares to compete in "Krusty's Holiday Trample".

episodes.title: The Clown Stays in the Picture
episodes.description: Krusty reveals the untold story of his past in his movie "The Sands of Space". While working as personal assistants on the movie, Bart and Lisa learn about the early years of their parents' relationship.

episodes.title: 101 Mitigations
episodes.description: Comic Book Guy sues Homer for joyriding in his car. Meanwhile, Guillermo del Toro saves Mr. Burns from his troubles with the law.

episodes.title: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
episodes.description: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia; Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

episodes.title: E My Sports
episodes.description: As Bart begins to excel in video game competitions, Homer discovers a passion for coaching him; Lisa attempts to bring Homer back to reality, but the plan causes chaos.
episodes.notes: This episode marked The Simpsons' first deep dive into esports culture, predicting the mainstream acceptance of competitive gaming that would explode during the 2020 pandemic.

episodes.title: Bart vs. Itchy & Scratchy
episodes.description: Krusty releases an all-female reboot of “Itchy and Scratchy,” so Bart and his crew of all-male friends decide to boycott the show. After Bart’s friends turn on him for laughing at the reboot, Bart joins a woke group of sixth-grade girls who commit crimes against patriarchy.
episodes.parody_of: Modern feminism and gender politics debates
episodes.notes: This episode marked one of the show's most direct engagements with contemporary gender politics and online culture wars, reflecting real-world debates about female reboots of male-dominated franchises. The storyline mirrored actual controversies surrounding properties like the 2016 Ghostbusters reboot and similar gender-swapped entertainment properties.

episodes.title: Girl's in the Band
episodes.description: Homer works extra shifts at the plant so Lisa can play in the Capitol City Philharmonic.

episodes.title: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh
episodes.description: Marge becomes director of Springfield's local theater, armed with Lisa's script resembling "Hamilton"; Homer joins a baby class with Maggie, and he takes a liking to supervisor Chloe.
episodes.notes: This episode marks one of the show's most ambitious Broadway parody productions, with Lisa's "Hamilton"-inspired script featuring elaborate musical numbers that required extensive choreography and original songwriting from the show's composers.

episodes.title: D'oh Canada
episodes.description: Lisa is mistakenly given political asylum in Canada during a family trip to Niagara Falls.

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.notes: This episode marks one of the rare instances where a Simpson family member seriously considers permanently leaving Springfield, with Lisa actually receiving official asylum status from another country.

episodes.title: Woo-Hoo Dunnit?
episodes.description: The documentary crime series "Dateline: Springfield" goes in-depth to solve the case of Lisa’s missing college fund.
episodes.parody_of: Dateline NBC and true crime documentaries
episodes.notes: This late-season episode marked one of the most direct parodies of the true crime documentary format that had exploded in popularity during the 2010s streaming era. The mockumentary style allowed for rare fourth-wall breaks as characters directly addressed the camera in confessional-style interviews.

episodes.title: Crystal Blue-Haired Persuasion
episodes.description: Marge starts a business selling healing crystals to the naive mothers of Springfield when Homer’s work cuts children’s health-care benefits, leading Marge to use the crystals as a cheaper solution for Bart’s ADD.

episodes.title: The Winter of Our Monetized Content
episodes.description: When a video of Bart and Homer fighting goes viral, they begin a journey as social media celebrities; Lisa battles the school's new industrialized detention system.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Jimbo Jones / Leslie Sky (voice)

episodes.parody_of: Social media culture and viral video phenomenon
episodes.notes: This season 31 premiere marked The Simpsons' entry into its fourth decade on television, making it the first animated series to reach such longevity milestone.

episodes.title: Go Big or Go Homer
episodes.description: Homer must supervise interns, among whom is a go-getter who asks Homer to be his mentor.

episodes.title: The Fat Blue Line
episodes.description: During the San Castellanta street festival, much of the town finds their wallets have been pickpocketed; after the state investigator puts the wrong man in jail, Chief Wiggum sets out to catch the real criminal and show he's still up for police work.
episodes.parody_of: Police procedural dramas and detective stories

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXX
episodes.description: The 666th episode of the Simpsons parodies the Omen and Stranger Things, not to mention a little Crazy Rich Aliens.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Jimbo Jones / Rod Flanders (voice)

episodes.couch_gag: The family sits on the couch which transforms into a monster that devours them, fitting the horror theme.
episodes.parody_of: The Omen, Stranger Things, and Crazy Rich Asians
episodes.notes: This milestone 666th episode aired on October 20, 2019, making it the first Treehouse of Horror to coincidentally align its episode number with the biblical "number of the beast.

episodes.title: Gorillas on the Mast
episodes.description: After a trip to Aquatraz Water Park, Lisa becomes determined to set free Springfield's most vicious animals in captivity. Meanwhile, Homer fulfills a lifelong dream of buying a boat, and quickly realizes boat ownership sucks.

episodes.title: Marge the Lumberjill
episodes.description: When Marge realizes that everyone views her as boring, she takes up competitive lumber-jacking as a hobby (and has a real gift for it). The circuit of competitive timbersports takes her on a month-long retreat to Portland with her trainer, Paula, whom Homer worries is going to steal her away forever

episodes.title: Livin La Pura Vida
episodes.description: The Simpsons join other Springfield families on the Van Houten's annual trip to Costa Rica, which they obviously can't afford. While there, Homer befriends Patty's new girlfriend, Evelyn, and Lisa tracks down the real reason the Van Houtens can go on this trip every year
episodes.notes: This episode marks the first time Patty's sexuality is explicitly addressed with a same-sex relationship, as she introduces her girlfriend Evelyn to the family.

episodes.title: Thanksgiving of Horror
episodes.description: The Simpsons face various Thanksgiving nightmares, including the first Thanksgiving, an A.I. mishap and a dangerous space mission complicated by a sentient cranberry sauce.
episodes.parody_of: Anthology horror formats like Twilight Zone and Tales from the Crypt
episodes.notes: This marked the first time The Simpsons produced a Thanksgiving-themed anthology episode, breaking from the traditional October "Treehouse of Horror" format to create holiday horror vignettes.

episodes.title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
episodes.description: Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith, so Ned sends him to live with the Simpsons, hoping they can scare him into believing in God again.

episodes.title: Bobby: It's Cold Outside
episodes.description: Sideshow Bob gets contracted as this year’s mall Santa. Meanwhile, someone is stealing all the Christmas packages off people’s front porches.

guests.character: Dolph Starbeam / Cassandra Patters / Random Childon (voice)

episodes.title: Hail to the Teeth
episodes.description: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff’s wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realize that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge. Meanwhile, Lisa grapples with the misogynistic implications of the immediate popularity she receives after getting her new Invisalign braces.

episodes.title: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
episodes.description: Marge recruits Chrissy Teigen and John Legend for an education-based proposal.
episodes.notes: Chrissy Teigen and John Legend appear as themselves in this musical episode, marking one of the few times real-life married celebrities have guest starred together as a couple on The Simpsons.

episodes.title: Frinkcoin
episodes.description: Lisa decides to do an essay on Professor Frink just as the scientist invents a new cryptocurrency. When this makes him the richest man in Springfield, Mr. Burns sees red and he starts plotting against Frink in order to restore his former status, while Frink learns who his real friends are.

guests.character: Crazy Cat Lady / Professor Hessler / People at Therapy (voice)

episodes.parody_of: cryptocurrency boom and tech billionaire culture

episodes.title: Bart the Bad Guy
episodes.description: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero movie one month before its intended release, and uses his knowledge to terrorize the other fans. Two executive producers of the film attempt to prevent Bart from leaking any more news to the public.
episodes.parody_of: Marvel Cinematic Universe and superhero movie culture

episodes.title: Screenless
episodes.description: When Marge implements a screen time limit for the family, she realizes that she is the one addicted.
episodes.notes: This episode aired during the COVID-19 pandemic when screen time addiction became a widespread concern for families in lockdown, making it one of the most topically relevant Simpsons episodes of the era.

episodes.title: Better Off Ned
episodes.description: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz; a heroic act by Homer makes Bart look up to him again.

episodes.title: Highway to Well
episodes.description: When Maggie goes to preschool, Marge decides to get a job to pass the time and ends up working at an upscale weed dispensary; Homer decides to open his own dispensary that mimics a sketchy drug deal, putting their two businesses at odds.

episodes.title: The Incredible Lightness of Being a Baby
episodes.description: Mr. Burns tasks Homer with swindling Cletus Spuckler out of his newfound helium fortune. Meanwhile, Maggie is reunited with Hudson from Playdate with Destiny again, only for Marge to tear them apart after his mother annoys her.

episodes.title: Warrin' Priests (1)
episodes.description: Helen Lovejoy's request for a youth pastor is answered by Bode Wright, a charismatic young preacher from Michigan. When Bode quickly has the Springfield congregation enamored by his easy-going and liberal approach to religion, an outcast and suspicious Reverend Lovejoy decides to look into the newcomer's past.

episodes.title: Warrin' Priests (2)
episodes.description: While Bode has won over most of Springfield, he finds one churchgoer he can't sway in Ned Flanders. Meanwhile in Michigan, Reverend Lovejoy finds the ammunition he needs to get rid of his replacement.

episodes.title: The Hateful Eight-Year-Olds
episodes.description: After severing her sibling ties with Bart, Lisa attends a sleepover at her new friend Addy's house, only to discover that Addy's clique are a group of cruel snobby rich girls that taunt her. Meanwhile, Homer takes Marge on a sunset cruise for the evening and finds himself at odds with the boat's cover band.

guests.character: Think God I'm Dead Guy / Crowd Members (voice)
Think God I'm Dead Lady / Crowd Members (voice)

episodes.title: The Way of the Dog
episodes.description: Santa's Little Helper nips at Marge, causing the family to reflect on the difficult life that the dog led prior to being adopted by the family. They end up reuniting him with his mother to avoid having to euthanize him.

episodes.title: Undercover Burns
episodes.description: Mr. Burns goes undercover as "Fred" at the nuclear power plant and becomes friends with Homer and the gang. Burns implements all sorts of amenities to improve his employees' lives, but a jealous Smithers plots to bring the old, bitter Burns back and destroy Fred.
episodes.notes: This episode marked The Simpsons' first parody of the reality TV phenomenon "Undercover Boss," which had become a cultural touchstone of the 2010s.

episodes.title: I, Carumbus
episodes.description: At a museum exhibit of Ancient Rome, Marge and Homer get into an argument about Homer's lack of ambition. They then imagine a Roman version of what would happen if Homer was more career-driven.

episodes.title: Now Museum, Now You Don't
episodes.description: Lisa stays home from school to explore the wonders of Western art. She appears as Lisanardo, while Bart takes the shape of a French impressionist, Homer and Marge as Diego Rivera and Frida Kahlo, and Maggie as a warrior Cupid.
episodes.parody_of: Western art history and famous paintings

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXI
episodes.description: The 31st annual Simpsons Halloween special includes a frightening look at the 2020 election, parodies of Toy Story and Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse and a 9th birthday Lisa just can't get over.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Jimbo Jones / Jane Russell (voice)
Headless Malibu Stacy / Dolph Starbeam / Hansel (voice)

episodes.parody_of: Toy Story, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
episodes.notes: This marked the first Treehouse of Horror to directly parody the ongoing U.S. presidential election, airing just two days before the 2020 Biden-Trump contest.

episodes.title: The 7 Beer Itch
episodes.description: Homer is tempted by a British femme fatale while Marge and the kids are on a seaside vacation.

guests.character: Tour Guide / Female Baker / Running Crowd (voice)
Leonardo DiCaprio / British Homer / Running Crowd (voice)

episodes.title: Podcast News
episodes.description: Grampa Simpson is accused of a crime; Kent Brockman questions his career.

guests.character: Agnes Skinner / Crazy Cat Lady / Alice Glick (voice)

episodes.parody_of: true crime podcasts and investigative journalism

episodes.title: Three Dreams Denied
episodes.description: Bart becomes a voice-over actor; Comic Book Guy is humiliated at Comic-Con; Lisa is set up for a fall.

guests.character: Agnes Skinner / Zoe Burwell / Dolph Starbeam (voice)

episodes.title: The Road to Cincinnati
episodes.description: Odd couple Skinner and Chalmers embark on an 800-mile car ride to Cincinnati to attend an administrator's convention - but can they reach their destination without killing each other first?

guests.character: Veteran / Bartender / Pig / Cyclist / Injured Person (voice)
Janey Powell / Improv Shakespeare Actress #1 / Cyclist (voice)

episodes.title: Sorry Not Sorry
episodes.description: Lisa calls her teacher, Ms. Hoover, a hack and refuses to apologize. Then, she learns Ms. Hoover's private pain.

episodes.title: A Springfield Summer Christmas for Christmas
episodes.description: A cable channel films a Christmas movie in Springfield and Skinner falls in love.
episodes.notes: This episode marked one of the rare occasions where Principal Skinner was given a romantic storyline as the main plot, breaking from his typical role as a supporting character in student-focused stories.

episodes.title: The Dad Feelings Limited
episodes.description: Comic Book Guy and his wife Kumiko debate about having a baby and we learn about his awesome origin story.

guests.character: What This Crazy Place Is Narrator (voice)

episodes.notes: This marks the first episode to focus primarily on Comic Book Guy's personal life and backstory, exploring his relationship with Kumiko and potential fatherhood after years as a secondary character.

episodes.title: Diary Queen
episodes.description: Bart finds his old teacher's diary and learns a surprising secret. Then, Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

episodes.title: Wad Goals
episodes.description: Bart becomes a successful caddy, but Marge worries it is ruining his character.

episodes.title: Yokel Hero
episodes.description: Cletus becomes a singing sensation, while Homer becomes a new man. Then, Cletus turns on his fans, ruining everything.

episodes.title: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars
episodes.description: Homer tries to reunite a mechanical band from his youth, but film and TV creator J.J. Abrams gets ahold of them first.
episodes.parody_of: Chuck E. Cheese animatronic bands and J.J. Abrams productions
episodes.notes: J.J. Abrams guest starred as himself, marking one of the few times a major Hollywood director appeared on the show to parody their own work and reputation for mystery box storytelling.

episodes.title: Manger Things
episodes.description: A secret of Flanders' Past and a never-before-seen room of the Simpson house are shown off.

guests.character: Irish Mother / Female Announcer / Christmas Choir Singer (voice)

episodes.notes: This episode revealed the Simpson house's mysterious locked room for the first time in the show's 32-season history, finally addressing a long-standing fan question about the home's layout.

episodes.title: Uncut Femmes
episodes.description: It is discovered that Chief Wiggum's wife is more than she seems. Meanwhile, Marge takes part in a jewel heist.

episodes.title: Burger Kings
episodes.description: Mr. Burns gets into the plant-based burger business. Lisa refuses to believe he's up to no good.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Director / Cheering Crowd (voice)
Nurse / Mrs. Burns / Alexa / Wendy / Cheering Crowd (voice)
Mark Zuckerberg / Man in Prison / Male Audience Member (voice)

episodes.title: Panic on the Streets of Springfield
episodes.description: Lisa gets a new imaginary friend - a depressed British singer from the 1980s. Meanwhile, Homer becomes a truck guy.
episodes.notes: The first time The Simpsons directly parodied Morrissey and The Smiths, featuring Benedict Cumberbatch as the voice of Quilloughby, Lisa's imaginary depressed British singer friend.

episodes.title: Mother and Child Reunion
episodes.description: Lisa makes a shocking college decision, wounding Marge. It leads to a very surprising place.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / White House Worker (voice)
Little Boy / Lisa's Student #2 / Mother Translator (voice)

episodes.title: The Man from G.R.A.M.P.A.
episodes.description: A British secret agent comes to Springfield in search of a Russian spy.

episodes.title: The Last Barfighter
episodes.description: After Moe breaks their most sacred rule, a secret society of bartenders seeks ultimate vengeance on Homer and his friends.

episodes.title: The Star of the Backstage
episodes.description: A musical comes to life in Springfield as Marge stages a revival of her beloved high school show - but her wonderful memories are threatened by the return of a rival from the past.
episodes.parody_of: High school musical theater and Broadway revivals

episodes.title: Bart's in Jail
episodes.description: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scammer, the Simpsons set out on a mission of vengeance to get his money back.

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXII
episodes.description: The 32nd annual Simpsons Halloween special includes a spoof of "Parasite" and a segment where Bambi gets his revenge.
episodes.notes: The "Parasite" parody marked the first time a Treehouse of Horror segment directly spoofed a recent Best Picture Oscar winner, coming just two years after the Korean film's historic Academy Awards sweep.

episodes.title: The Wayz We Were
episodes.description: Evergreen Terrace is overrun with traffic and Moe has a fateful choice to make.
episodes.parody_of: Waze navigation app and modern traffic/GPS culture

episodes.title: Lisa's Belly
episodes.description: Marge puts a hurtful word in Lisa's brain and Bart gets swole.

guests.character: Elizabeth Hoover / Helen Lovejoy / Luann Van Houten (voice)

episodes.title: A Serious Flanders (1)
episodes.description: When a ruthless debt collector come to Springfield, Homer and Ned's lives are sucked into the artificial world of prestige TV.
episodes.parody_of: Fargo TV series and prestige television dramas
episodes.notes: This two-part episode marked The Simpsons' most ambitious attempt at parodying prestige television format, abandoning traditional episode structure to mimic the slow-burn, cinematic style of shows like Fargo and True Detective.

episodes.title: A Serious Flanders (2)
episodes.description: Things for Ned and Homer go from bad to gosh-darn worse in the stunning conclusion of this 'Simpflix' prestige crime thriller.
episodes.parody_of: Prestige crime thrillers like Fargo and True Detective
episodes.notes: This two-part storyline marked The Simpsons' first attempt at a serialized prestige television parody, directly spoofing the "Simpflix" streaming era with cinematic visual style and noir storytelling techniques rarely seen in the show's traditional format.

episodes.title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire
episodes.description: Smithers finds true love with a famous fashion designer, but will his new relationship destroy Springfield?
episodes.parody_of: Portrait of a Lady on Fire

episodes.title: Mothers and Other Strangers
episodes.description: In a flashback, Homer goes on a road trip with his father to find his mother.

episodes.title: A Made Maggie
episodes.description: Fat Tony becomes Godfather to Maggie Simpson.

episodes.title: The Longest Marge
episodes.description: Marge and Mr. Burns fight for the soul of a brash young football prodigy.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Jimbo Jones / Child Crowd (voice)

episodes.title: Pixelated and Afraid
episodes.description: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive.

episodes.title: Boyz N the Highlands
episodes.description: Bart, Martin and the bullies run for their lives when a weekend in the wilderness takes a dark turn.

episodes.title: You Won't Believe What This Episode Is About -- Act Three Will Shock You!
episodes.description: Homer becomes a pariah when footage of him allegedly leaving Santa's Little Helper in a hot car goes viral.

guests.character: Shauna Chalmers /Brandine Spuckler / Crazy Cat Lady (voice)

episodes.parody_of: clickbait journalism and viral outrage culture
episodes.notes: The episode's clickbait-style title directly parodies the viral content culture it critiques, making it one of the few Simpsons episodes whose title format mirrors its subject matter.

episodes.title: Bart the Cool Kid
episodes.description: When Bart befriends a famous kid influencer who owns an ultra-cool skate wear brand, Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against them.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Orion Hughes Fan #1 (voice)
Dolph Shapiro / Shauna Chalmers / Orion Hughes Fan #2 (voice)

episodes.parody_of: Social media influencer culture and skate brand marketing

episodes.title: Pretty Whittle Liar
episodes.description: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love ... of learning.

episodes.title: The Sound of Bleeding Gums
episodes.description: Lisa meets the son of the late musician Bleeding Gums Murphy - and attempts to improve his life.

episodes.title: My Octopus and a Teacher
episodes.description: Bart can't control his feelings when he gets a new teacher. Meanwhile, Lisa befriends an octopus.
episodes.notes: This episode parodies the acclaimed 2020 Netflix documentary "My Octopus Teacher," which won the Academy Award for Best Documentary Feature.

episodes.title: Girls Just Shauna Have Fun
episodes.description: When Lisa joins the high school marching band, she finds an unlikely mentor in Shauna Chalmers. Meanwhile, Homer becomes a craft beer brewer.

episodes.title: Marge the Meanie
episodes.description: A surprise from Marge's past has her bonding with Bart and terrifying Homer.

episodes.title: Meat Is Murder
episodes.description: Grampa finds himself in a pickle when his hidden hamburger past comes back to "ketchup" with him.

guests.character: Me and the Space Clown Kid (voice)

episodes.title: Poorhouse Rock
episodes.description: After Bart humiliates him at church, Homer finally teaches his son to admire his dad - until a visit from a magical, singing janitor changes everything they thought they knew.

guests.character: Helen Lovejoy / Elizabeth Hoover / Luann Van Houten (voice)
Crazy Cat Lady / Linda / Agnes Skinner (voice)

episodes.title: Habeas Tortoise
episodes.description: After Homer humiliates himself in a town meeting, he looks for acceptance in an internet group hunting for a missing tortoise but finds something much more sinister.
episodes.parody_of: QAnon conspiracy theories and online conspiracy groups
episodes.notes: The Simpsons' first direct parody of QAnon conspiracy theories, marking the show's continued relevance in satirizing contemporary internet culture after more than three decades on air.

episodes.title: One Angry Lisa
episodes.description: Lisa gets called for jury duty while Marge becomes obsessed with her exercise bike.

episodes.title: Lisa the Boy Scout
episodes.description: When the Boy Explorers become co-ed, Bart and Lisa vow to "out scout" each other at the annual jamboree.

guests.character: Phone Operator / Canadian Player #3 / Doug Flutie (voice)
Doreen / Lady on Fire / Agnes Skinner (voice)

episodes.parody_of: Boy Scouts/scouting organizations and outdoor adventure competitions

episodes.title: The King of Nice
episodes.description: Marge is hired as a segment producer on Krusty's new daytime talk show. But her initial excitement about the job fades when she discovers what an endless nightmare it is!

guests.character: Focus Group Lady / Affluence Acre Children (voice)
Lindsey Naegle / Agnes Skinner / Mom Squad (voice)

episodes.title: Not It
episodes.description: Homer and his teenaged friends are pursued by a killer clown in a spoof of Stephen King's novel "It".

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXIII
episodes.description: In a book-themed trilogy, Marge's resentment takes monstrous form, Lisa tries to save the planet through murder and Homer learns he's not the man he thought he was.

guests.character: Homer Fan #2 / People by Death Tome (voice)

episodes.notes: This marked the 34th Treehouse of Horror episode, making The Simpsons the longest-running animated series to maintain an annual Halloween anthology tradition.

episodes.title: From Beer to Paternity
episodes.description: When Homer becomes Duffman's girl-dad hero, they go on a road trip with Lisa that threatens to expose Homer's terrible parenting.

episodes.title: Step Brother from the Same Planet
episodes.description: Homer is stunned by his feelings of rage and resentment when Grampa becomes a doting stepfather to his girlfriend's quirky young son. Lisa and Bart throw the ultimate slumber party.

episodes.title: When Nelson Met Lisa
episodes.description: A future tale of the will-they-won't-they-I-guess-they-won't-maybe-they-will of Springfield's most unlikely couple.

episodes.title: Game Done Changed
episodes.description: When Bart discovers a profitable glitch in an online game, he ropes Principal Skinner into his lucrative criminal enterprise. Marge and Maggie discover paradise.

episodes.title: Top Goon
episodes.description: Coach Moe recruits the world's greatest brawlers to teach Nelson the art of hockey goonery.
episodes.parody_of: Hockey goon culture and sports training montages

episodes.title: My Life as a Vlog
episodes.description: Through a series of YouTube recommended videos, the story of the rise and fall of The Simpson Family Vlog is revealed.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Jimbo Jones / Birthday Spuckler (voice)

episodes.parody_of: YouTube vlogging culture and social media influencers

episodes.title: The Many Saints of Springfield
episodes.description: When Ned Flanders falls on hard times, Fat Tony makes him an offer he can't refuse.

episodes.title: Carl Carlson Rides Again
episodes.description: When Carl is smitten by a beautiful woman, he looks into the roots of his own identity by discovering the origins of a mysterious rodeo buckle.

guests.character: Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.title: Bartless
episodes.description: When Bart's latest prank leads to chaos at Springfield Elementary, Marge and Homer dream of a world in which their rambunctious son was never a Simpson.

episodes.title: Hostile Kirk Place
episodes.description: When Milhouse's Dad, Kirk, takes exception to a school history lesson that paints one of his ancestors in a bad light, Kirk goes on a crusade to censor and control the school curriculum -- a crusade that Homer co-opts for fun and profit.

episodes.title: Pin Gal
episodes.description: A mysterious figure from Marge's past returns to coach her for a bowling tournament.

episodes.title: Fan-ily Feud
episodes.description: Homer publicly disparages a pop singer and faces the ire of her vindictive and highly organized fan army.
episodes.parody_of: Pop star fan culture and social media mob mentality

episodes.title: Write Off This Episode
episodes.description: When Marge and Lisa start a charity together, Marge is seduced by the money and prestige of Big Charity fundraising.

episodes.title: The Very Hungry Caterpillars
episodes.description: When a plague of insects shuts down Springfield, the Simpsons face their greatest challenge yet… spending time in lockdown with each other.

guests.character: Milhouse Van Houten / Rod Flanders / Miss Springfield (voice)

episodes.title: Clown v. Board of Education
episodes.description: Krusty opens a school for clowning, and it becomes the most successful thing he's ever done.

guests.character: Commercial Guy at the Beach / Award Man (voice)

episodes.title: Homer's Adventures Through the Windshield Glass
episodes.description: Time stands still after Homer crashes his car and flies through the windshield. As his life flashes before his eyes, a magical friend helps Homer learn the secret truth about his marriage.

episodes.title: Homer's Crossing
episodes.description: Feeling worthless at work, Homer volunteers to be a school crossing guard. But when his safety squad receives too much funding, the crossing guards become a force to be feared.

episodes.title: A Mid-Childhood Night's Dream
episodes.description: Marge feels an overwhelming dread of the empty nest.

episodes.title: McMansion & Wife
episodes.description: When a new neighbor showers him with kindness, Homer thinks he's being tricked into buying a sports car at the dealership where the neighbor works - but the truth turns out to be even more sinister; Lisa neutralizes Nelson after he goes on a bullying spree.

guests.character: Ms. Muntz / Mrs. Bad Halloween Candy / Shauna Chalmers (voice)

episodes.title: Thirst Trap: A Corporate Love Story
episodes.description: In a parody documentary, a young college-dropout CEO embraces the Silicon Valley "fake it until you make it" philosophy and bewitches Mr. Burns into funding her highly dubious dream project.
episodes.parody_of: Silicon Valley startup documentaries and Theranos scandal

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXIV
episodes.description: After Bart is turned into an NFT, Marge fights though the blockchain to rescue her son. To track down a gruesome serial killer, Lisa turns to a murderer from her past. An outbreak transforms Springfielders into a plague of lazy, beer-loving oafs.
episodes.parody_of: NFTs/blockchain culture, serial killer thrillers, zombie/infection movies
episodes.notes: The first Treehouse of Horror segment to tackle NFTs and cryptocurrency culture, reflecting the show's continued relevance in satirizing contemporary digital phenomena. This marked one of the most technically complex animation sequences in the series as Marge navigates through blockchain-inspired digital landscapes.

episodes.title: Iron Marge
episodes.description: When Marge's heart is broken by a bad birthday present, Bart and Lisa must dig into their mom's past to show that they really know her. Homer becomes a neighborhood fear-monger.

episodes.title: It's a Blunderful Life
episodes.description: Lisa recounts the story of how Homer was scapegoated for a power outage that plunged Springfield into darkness days before Thanksgiving.

episodes.title: AE Bonny Romance
episodes.description: When Groundskeeper Willie is kidnapped to Scotland, Bart and the Simpsons follow - only to discover that what awaits is Homer's worst nightmare.
episodes.parody_of: Scottish culture and Highland romance tropes

episodes.title: Murder, She Boat
episodes.description: Lisa must solve a closed-boat mystery when Comic Book Guy's million-dollar action figure is "murdered" on a pop culture cruise.
episodes.parody_of: Murder mystery genre and Agatha Christie stories

episodes.title: Do the Wrong Thing
episodes.description: Homer and Bart become kings of the blue-collar sports circuit, but Marge suspects something dishonest at the core of their father-son bond.

episodes.title: Frinkenstein's Monster
episodes.description: Professor Frink secretly helps Homer, through a zoom interview, land a high-level position at a state-of-the-art nuclear plant in Shelbyville. But since Homer lacks the skills to actually perform the job, Frink must monitor Homer's work situation remotely and dictate his every word... causing Frink to fear he's created a monster.

guests.character: Viking Masseuse / Admitted Fraud #1 / Admitted Fraud #4 (voice)
Employment Agent / Admitted Fraud #2 / Angry Woman (voice)

episodes.title: Lisa Gets an F1
episodes.description: Lisa feels a need for speed as well a need for control of her anxiety when she becomes a pro kid go-cart racer.

episodes.title: Clan of the Cave Mom
episodes.description: A parenting disagreement between Marge and Luann Van Houten escalates into a life-or-death struggle for survival.

episodes.title: Night of the Living Wage
episodes.description: Marge gets a job in a high-pressure ghost kitchen, but when she tries to start a union, she gets more than she (collectively) bargained for.
episodes.parody_of: zombie horror films and labor movement films

episodes.title: Cremains of the Day
episodes.description: When someone in Homer's life passes away, he and guys from Moe's go on a road trip to scatter the ashes... but will their friendship die as well?

episodes.title: The Tell-Tale Pants
episodes.description: Marge comes upon a surprising windfall and, angry with Homer, spends it secretly on herself.

episodes.title: The Tipping Point
episodes.description: Homer loses his mind over tipping culture run amok.

episodes.title: Bart's Brain
episodes.description: Bart makes a new friend.

episodes.title: Bart's Birthday
episodes.description: Bart celebrates the most shocking birthday party of his entire life — one that might just change everyone in Springfield forever.

episodes.title: The Yellow Lotus
episodes.description: The Simpsons encounter death on vacation at a high-end resort.

guests.character: Lindsey Naegle / Hotel Staff #1 / Additional Voices (voice)

episodes.title: Desperately Seeking Lisa
episodes.description: Lisa has a blazing misadventure in the dark world of Capital City's downtown art scene.

episodes.title: Shoddy Heat
episodes.description: An unearthed corpse opens up a cold case from Springfield in the 1980s… as well as a steamy relationship between young Grampa and Agnes Skinner.

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXV
episodes.description: Giant monsters created by political rage threaten to tear the town apart, a Victorian Mr. Burns is jump-scared on Thanksgiving by the ghosts of his abused workers, and Homer bonds with a pair of extra-terrestrial jeans in an unforgettable stop-motion adventure that can only be called… Denim.
episodes.parody_of: A Christmas Carol and classic horror monster movies
episodes.notes: The "Denim" segment marks the first time The Simpsons used stop-motion animation in a Treehouse of Horror anthology, representing a significant departure from the show's traditional 2D format.

episodes.title: Women in Shorts
episodes.description: Girls just want to have funny.

guests.character: Helen Lovejoy / Elizabeth Hoover / Luann Van Houten (voice)

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror Presents: Simpsons Wicked This Way Comes
episodes.description: A tattooed man at a mysterious night circus transports Lisa into three strange stories from the innocent 1950s, the chilling retro-present, and a brutalist future where prestige TV rules the world.

episodes.title: Convenience Airways
episodes.description: The Simpsons are trapped on a flight with the most unruly passengers in America.
episodes.parody_of: airplane disaster films and airline industry

episodes.title: Homer and Her Sisters
episodes.description: After a fight in an escape room, Krusty's truth-telling Aunt fixes Homer's relationship with Patty and Selma.

episodes.title: The Man Who Flew Too Much
episodes.description: The new and improved Pin Pals travel to Capital City for their first ever state bowling championship.

guests.character: News Reporter / Camera Lady / Fausto's girlfriend (voice)

episodes.title: Bottle Episode
episodes.description: Marge and Smithers team up to become wine-forging Robin Hoods.

episodes.title: The Flandshees of Innersimpson
episodes.description: Bart dips his toe into the world of celebrity DJ-ing, and Homer finally pushes Flanders too far.

episodes.title: The Last Man Expanding
episodes.description: Springfield becomes hooked on a miracle weight loss drug... all except Homer.

episodes.title: P.S. I Hate You
episodes.description: Marge's "nice-lady" reputation is on the line when an unknown blackmailer threatens to expose the angry woman she is inside.

episodes.title: Abe League of Their Moe
episodes.description: After Grampa and Moe recruit a Macedonian slugger to play in Springfield, it strains their friendship and the very integrity of baseball.

episodes.title: Stew Lies
episodes.description: Homer reinvigorates a celebrity chef's lost passion for food... with some help from the mob.

guests.character: Fat Tony / Fat Tony's Former Father (voice)
Carl Carlson / Security Guard / Male Scientist (voice)

episodes.title: Full Heart, Empty Pool
episodes.description: Homer and Grampa team up to create a new sport that rivals pickleball, until Homer kicks Grampa off the team.

guests.character: Dolph Shapiro/Squeaky Voiced Teen's Mother/Avocado Server/Amy (voice)

episodes.title: Estranger Things
episodes.description: When Bart & Lisa stop watching Itchy & Scratchy together, Marge fears that they'll start to drift apart... but she has no idea how bad things are about to get!

episodes.title: Thrifty Ways to Thieve Your Mother
episodes.description: When Lisa starts wearing Marge's "vintage" clothes from the 90's, she's welcomed into the school's super-elite fashion club. But as they run out of retro looks, the funky fashionistas become obsessed with getting more... by hook or by crook.

guests.character: Janet Grody / Teenage Women / Agnes Skinner (voice)

episodes.title: Keep Chalm and Gary On
episodes.description: Homer gets Superintendent Chalmers a job at the power plant. There, Chalmers discovers huge mutated snails that produce valuable slime launching his new career as a man-o-sphere guru.

guests.character: Martin Prince / Sherri Mackleberry / Terri Mackleberry (voice)

episodes.title: Treehouse of Horror XXXVI
episodes.description: Springfield is threatened by a mysterious killer monster emerging from the sewers, Krusty welcomes a demonic guest to his Halloween special, and the action moves a thousand years into the future in a post-apocalyptic, plastic version of the city.
episodes.parody_of: Horror anthology films and post-apocalyptic sci-fi

episodes.title: Men Behaving Manly
episodes.description: Springfield's men are in crisis.

guests.character: Alexa / Dolph Starbeam / Lindsey Naegle / Brandine Spuckler / Agnes Skinner / Baba Branka (voice)
